education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical
raw_text:
38. Die Inspection Engineer

Job Summary  
Ensu res dies used in manufacturing processes meet dimensional accuracy and functional 
requirements.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Inspect die components and assemblies  
• Verify clearances, alignment, and tolerances  
• Conduct trial inspections during die testing  
• Analyze defects related to die quality  
• Collaborate with design and production teams  
• Maintain quality documentation  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of die construction and sheet metal processes  
• GD&T and tolerance analysis  
• Inspection and measurement expertise  
• Analyt ical problem -solving  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹25,000 – ₹50,000 per month
